name: @ansvar/finnish-standards-mcp
description: Finnish government cybersecurity standards MCP -- Julkri, Katakri, NCSC-FI guidelines, Tietosuojavaltuutetun ohjeet, VAHTI, Kanta health services security. Part of the Ansvar MCP Network (ansvar.ai/mcp)

scripts.ingest:full: node --import tsx scripts/ingest-julkri.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-ncsc-fi.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-tietosuoja.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-katakri.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-vahti.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-kanta.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-traficom.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-dvv.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-kyberturvallisuuslaki.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-finanssivalvonta.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-terveydenhuolto.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-energia-liikenne.ts && node --import tsx scripts/ingest-kansalliset-standardit.ts && npm run build:db && npm run coverage:update
